---
name: Feature / enhancement
about: Something to add to Hydra's three core jobs (parallel issue-clearing / auto-testing / cloud env-spawning)
labels: ''
---

## Why

What's the problem this solves? What signal triggered it (pattern in memory, recurring escalation, observed failure)?

## Goal

What does "done" look like? Concrete acceptance criteria.

## Approach (optional)

If you already have a design in mind, sketch it here. Alternatives considered.

## Tests

How will we know it works? At least one concrete check per goal.

## Tier

T1 (trivial, auto-merge) / T2 (commander auto-merges after review) / T3 (refused)
